statement.en: Decentralized Learning of Belief-Dependent Generalized Nash Equilibria under Partial Observability

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (arXiv 2026-04-25) presenting novel theoretical results on decentralized learning algorithms for belief-dependent generalized Nash equilibria under partial observability. The work combines game theory (GNE), multi-agent learning, and information-theoretic constraints. As an unvalidated preprint, it occupies provisional status—claims are not yet peer-reviewed, convergence proofs may contain gaps, and empirical validation is limited. The theoretical framework itself is internally consistent but awaits community scrutiny.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 各エージェントの信念に基づく勾配流が、部分情報の霧の中で均衡へ収束する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 三つのエージェントが不完全な視界の層を通して、暗黙の合意へ螺旋を描く。
